# Liatrio Daily Lead Research — 2026-06-18\n\nPaste everything below into Claude and ask it to research contacts.\n\n---\n\nI work at Liatrio, an enterprise AI and DevOps transformation consultancy. We help large enterprises with: Enterprise AI enablement, DevOps transformation, platform engineering, application modernization (cloud-native), cloud migration, security & compliance (DevSecOps), and workforce enablement/coaching.\n\nBelow are today's top 10 target companies based on trigger events that signal they may need Liatrio's services. For EACH company, please:\n\n1. Search LinkedIn and Google for 5-10 contacts at the company who would be the right decision-makers or influencers for Liatrio's offerings (CIO, CTO, VP of Engineering, Director of Platform Engineering, Director of DevOps, Head of Cloud, Enterprise Architect, etc.)\n2. For each contact, provide: Name, Title, LinkedIn URL\n3. Write a short personalized outreach message referencing the trigger event\n\n---\n\n## #1: Lockheed Martin (Signal Score: 14.5)\n\n**Liatrio Service Fit:** Security & Compliance\n**Suggested Angle:** Liatrio integrates security into the software delivery pipeline. Offer a DevSecOps assessment.\n\n**Trigger Events:**\n- [Security & Compliance] CMMC Phase 1 Is Here: What Defense Contractors Must Do Now - GovCon Wire\n  Source: GovCon Wire | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxQcHpzMTBEMXpzLVpRcUREd0hONVRiNnlJTjYxc1d3OHpPb2hRSkx6ekR2TEg5Z2VrVlVGQ3NyX3lDVkdadDNpM05jNFV2MWlXbl9pOG9DUTZGRW1tb1IxOTRDT29zdTh4aWlDOWh5ak1wYm1JUzVVVTd3UU5IM3hveC1qYUJEWDJ2RVJ0cmczZ1pkN3J2eEhsMw?oc=5\n- [DevOps & Platform Engineering] Lockheed Martin Flies Real-Time, Mission Enabling Kubernetes Onboard U-2 - Lockheed Martin\n  Source: Lockheed Martin | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxQeHphUDNzYllPT21sSXdsNkpaV1VMdnpWTE5ETHRLTkNaMmJzam5VdzljVWwtWnJPY2NxM0M2Ul9YWmlGeXp0cFJEODhNYVBNYVp0X1BuV3F2MGFoclNaTWZuWFNxMXpZcFFYVXlJNkxkR2FzV29KSnZUVlQzM0lPa3AwdkJYLVRFcG8xMm0tMGJPR0JqNFExNEtKbmtTTGdjeE1xSk9n?oc=5\n- [DevOps & Platform Engineering] Lockheed Martin Demos U-2 Dragon Lady Aircraft With Kubernetes Cloud;
